original_image_tags: A hand-drawn sketch depicts an object shaped like a pointed oval or egg. The object is oriented horizontally, with a wider, rounded end on the left tapering to a sharper point on the right.

elements.description: One hand-drawn sketch depicting an egg-shaped object with a tapered tail extending to the right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a hand-drawn sketch of an egg-shaped object oriented horizontally with a tapered end to the right.
